calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court orders the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: T. Jackson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Continued To Oct-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joyce Geri in Propria Persona.
Colleen McDonald (Stepdaughter of Decedent) also present.

The Court stated that it believes Ms. Geri needs to have Counsel to take this forward and explained that the process of probate is very complicated. Ms. Geri stated that it is financially not possible to have an Attorney. Ms. McDonald stated that Attorneys are asking for a $15,000.00 retainer. Ms. Geri stated that the estate is worth over $7,000,000.00, that her oldest stepsister is the executor, but she is not doing anything and that it has been one year since her Mother died. Ms. McDonald stated that they are the ones doing everything. The Court informed Ms. Geri that she has two months to get an Attorney or it will have to deny her petition. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to September 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Continued To May-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Continued To Apr-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joyce Geri in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that one of the items raised in the Probate Examiner's notes was taken care of, but there are a lot of other issues still out there. Ms. Geri stated that the Decedent was in a nursing facility in Alamo for four days and that the Decedent's residency was in San Francisco. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to April 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
